summary: Conjecture 4 from arXiv:2312.13061 posits a sufficient structural condition (sufficiently many well-separated long faces in G-U, a bipartite subgraph) under which every viable 4-coloring of the outer cycle extends to a full 4-coloring of a planar near-Eulerian-triangulation. The source paper was subsequently published as a journal article in the European Journal of Combinatorics 127 (2025), 104138, but this is the same work. No follow-up paper proving or disproving this conjecture was found in the indexed literature.
search_queries: "near-Eulerian-triangulation" "viable 4-coloring" OR "viable precoloring" bipartite independent set 4-coloring planar 2024 2025
Dvořák Moore Šámal "precoloring extension" planar 4-coloring 2024 2025 arxiv
DBLP fetch for Zdeněk Dvořák 2024-2025 publications
notes: The source paper was published as European Journal of Combinatorics 127 (2025) 104138 (same title, same authors — journal version only). A second EJC entry (vol. 129, 104183) by the same authors may be a corrigendum or companion piece. The related paper arXiv:2409.19165 (four-coloring Eulerian triangulations of the torus, Brianski–Kral–Lamaison–Shu) does not address this conjecture. No paper specifically resolving Conjecture 4 was found after a wide web search.
